Video.summary: Nate Oses learns from everyone he can, including some of the top fighters in MMA. He aspires not only to be a well-prepared fighter but to eventually move on to be a coach and mentor himself, helping to form great fighters in the future.
Video.grandparentTitle: Out of the Cage - Nate Oses
Video.title: Out of the Cage - Nate Oses

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - Nate Oses
Out of the Cage - Nate Oses
Out of the Cage - Nate Oses

Video.summary: Justin Basra takes on Jacob Smith at HK51. Justin comes with a tough wrestling background and ends with some lower back tightness. Cam MacDonald fights Sean Michaels and ends with a Tap Out! Cam had a hard weight cut and see how that impacts his fight against Sean Michaels.
Video.grandparentTitle: After The Fight - HK51 Cam Macdonald/Justin Basra
Video.title: After The Fight - HK51 Cam Macdonald/Justin Basra

Image.alt: After The Fight - HK51 Cam Macdonald/Justin Basra
After The Fight - HK51 Cam Macdonald/Justin Basra
After The Fight - HK51 Cam Macdonald/Justin Basra

Video.summary: Hard Knocks 44 kicks off with an Amateur Title Fight between wrestler Justin Basra and John 'The Dragon' Nguyen. This is followed by pros Zach Snyder vs. Kolton Menzak. Wrapping up this episode with the Main Event is Corey Devela vs. UFC Veteran Nick 'The Promise' Ring, who keeps going after five knee surgeries. You do not want to miss it!
Video.grandparentTitle: Fight Vault - HK44 - Episode 1
Video.title: Fight Vault - HK44 - Episode 1

Image.alt: Fight Vault - HK44 - Episode 1
Fight Vault - HK44 - Episode 1
Fight Vault - HK44 - Episode 1

Image.alt: Finish of the Day - Amanda Buckner v. Julie Kedzie - Bodog Fight
Finish of the Day - Amanda Buckner v. Julie Kedzie - Bodog Fight
Finish of the Day - Amanda Buckner v. Julie Kedzie - Bodog Fight

Video.summary: Hard Knocks 44 continues with two action-packed Light Heavyweight matchups. Anton Tokarchuk takes on Josh Heinz, and UFC Veteran Rodney Wallace goes the distance against Kalib Starnes.
Video.grandparentTitle: Fight Vault - HK44 - Episode 2
Video.title: Fight Vault - HK44 - Episode 2

Image.alt: Fight Vault - HK44 - Episode 2

Video.summary: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Jenn Wolstenholme
Video.grandparentTitle: Fighter Profile: Jenn Wolstenholme
Video.title: Fighter Profile: Jenn Wolstenholme

Image.alt: Fighter Profile: Jenn Wolstenholme
Fighter Profile: Jenn Wolstenholme
Fighter Profile: Jenn Wolstenholme
